name: GPU Cloud Pricing Comparison 2026: Every Major
snippet:

name: Amazon EC2 Pricing
snippet:
On-Demand Instances offer pay-as-you-go compute capacity by the hour or second. No upfront payment or long-term commitment are required.

name: AWS hikes EC2 GPU prices: strategy implications for AI
snippet:
Jan 8, 2026 — AWS hikes EC2 GPU prices by ~15 %. Discover the impact on enterprise AI budgets and 5 strategies to mitigate rising cloud costs.
